# Pride Digital

> Global studio designing and engineering custom websites, landing pages, e-commerce stores, and software for ambitious teams.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Studio overview and positioning.
- [Services](/services): Five practices — custom websites, portfolio sites, landing pages, e-commerce, custom software.
- [Custom Websites](/services/custom-websites): Brand sites built to convert.
- [Portfolio Websites](/services/portfolio-websites): Editorial showcases for creators and studios.
- [Landing Pages](/services/landing-pages): Single-purpose pages built around one decision.
- [E-commerce](/services/ecommerce): Stores tuned for AOV, repeat purchase, and margin.
- [Custom Software](/services/custom-software): Internal tools and bespoke platforms.
- [Industries](/industries): Sectors we go deep in — legal, healthcare, creators, e-commerce, SaaS.
- [Process](/process): Our six-phase method, from discovery to iteration.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Honest starting prices for each practice.
- [Work](/work): Selected case studies.
- [About](/about): The team behind Pride Digital.
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions about timelines, pricing, ownership, and process.
- [Book](/book): Schedule a 30-minute consultation.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch.
